$comment: Lighthouse CI assertion fixture — second SSoT. Paths come from build.config.json; assertion shape comes from this fixture. Sync merges both.
$comment-urls: Marketing routes that exist TODAY in .build/dist/. LHCI internal server (started via staticDistDir) substitutes its own host:port; URLs are path-only. The redesign change adds /use-cases/, /standards/, /writing/ — those land here when their /opsx:apply phases ship.
$comment-assert: LHCI rejects `preset` + `assertMatrix` simultaneously. The matrix is canonical; per-URL assertions inline below.

assertMatrix.$comment: Pre-redesign baselines. Tighten to perf:0.9 / a11y:0.95 / etc. once `update-site-marketing-redesign` archives — those are the spec-mandated targets per redesign Lighthouse Performance Gate Requirement.
